id.description: Unique identifier for the endpoint (auto-generated timestamped name if omitted).

mlModelTrainingJobId.description: Job ID from a completed training job.

mlModelTransformJobId.description: Job ID from a completed transform job.

update.description: Whether this is an update to an existing endpoint.

instanceType.description: ML instance type for the inference endpoint.

instanceCount.description: Minimum number of EC2 instances to deploy.
